events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need assess described field condition. Scenario: progress photos for Column/beam erection & plumb show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference AISC 303, OSHA 1926 Subpart R. No specific defects described. Stage rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no defects flagged, likely pass. But must be careful: as inspector, if only photos and no evidence of plumb/tolerance/connections, maybe needs_more_info? The prompt says "Progress photos ... show the current checkpoint scope finished for this area. The remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint being scored." That implies work appears complete and acceptable. We should return pass, low risk, rough-complete, percent_complete high e.g. 95. component_conditions empty. findings maybe note no significant defects observed; actions none. references AISC 303, OSHA 1926 Subpart R. Need include all fields. value 0, sound_source "", event_time 0, rate 0, order [], workable [].

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
